mapper.update:
update TB_CS_SOUND
set trashed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
set trashed_at = NULL
set deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
where seq = #{seq}
mapper.select: select ss.SEQ as seq , ss.division , ss.subject , DATE_FORMAT(ss.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt , DATE_FORMAT(ss.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updatedAt , ss.deleted_at as deletedAt , ss.trashed_at as trashedAt , ss.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , ss.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(ss.stt_started_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),"") as sttStartedAt from TB_CS_SOUND ss WHERE ss.seq = #{seq}

select ss.SEQ as seq , ss.subject , ss.created_at as createdAt , ss.updated_at as updatedAt , ss.deleted_at as deletedAt , ss.trashed_at as trashedAt , ss.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , ss.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , ss.click_least_once as clickLeastOnce , ss.reliability , ss.stt_started_at as sttStartedAt , ss.file_stereo_prefix as fileStereoPrefix , ss.channel_count as channelCount , ( SELECT count(s.SEQ) from TB_CS_SOUND s WHERE s.seq > 0
AND s.created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( s.status = '10' or s.status = '20' )
AND s.deleted_at is null AND s.trashed_at is null
AND s.deleted_at is null AND s.trashed_at is not null
AND s.file_new_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
AND s.seq = #{seq}
) AS hiddenCount , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION ct WHERE ct.sound_seq = ss.seq AND ct.train_text IS NOT NULL AND ct.train_text != '' ) AS trainTextCount from TB_CS_SOUND ss WHERE ss.seq > 0
AND ss.created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{searchStartDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND ( ss.status = '10' or ss.status = '20' )
AND ss.deleted_at is null AND ss.trashed_at is null
AND ss.deleted_at is null AND ss.trashed_at is not null
AND ss.file_new_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%')
AND ss.seq = #{seq}
order by ss.created_at desc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
mapper.insert: insert into TB_CS_SOUND ( division ,subject ,time_duration_ms ,file_org_nm ,file_new_nm ,file_conv_nm ,file_size_bytes ,TC_USER_SEQ ,reliability ) select '00' ,subject ,time_duration_ms ,file_org_nm ,#{fileNewNm} ,#{fileConvNm} ,file_size_bytes ,#{userSeq} ,reliability from TB_CS_MEETING where SEQ = #{seq}
mapper.select: select ss.SEQ as seq , ss.division , ss.subject , DATE_FORMAT(ss.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt , DATE_FORMAT(ss.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updatedAt , ss.deleted_at as deletedAt , ss.trashed_at as trashedAt , ss.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , ss.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(ss.stt_started_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),"") as sttStartedAt from TB_CS_SOUND ss WHERE ss.seq = #{seq}

select ss.SEQ as seq , ss.subject , ss.created_at as createdAt , ss.updated_at as updatedAt , ss.deleted_at as deletedAt , ss.trashed_at as trashedAt , ss.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , ss.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , ss.reliability , ss.stt_started_at as sttStartedAt , ( SELECT count(s.SEQ) from TB_CS_SOUND s LEFT JOIN TB_CS_INFO_DIVISION tis ON tis.division = s.division WHERE s.seq > 0 AND s.created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY ) AND ( s.status = '10' or s.status = '20' )
AND s.deleted_at is null AND s.trashed_at is null
AND s.deleted_at is null AND s.trashed_at is not null
AND (s.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) AS hiddenCount , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION ct WHERE ct.sound_seq = ss.seq AND ct.train_text IS NOT NULL AND ct.train_text != '' ) AS trainTextCount from TB_CS_SOUND ss WHERE ss.seq > 0 AND ss.created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY ) AND ( ss.status = '10' or ss.status = '20' )
AND ss.deleted_at is null AND ss.trashed_at is null
AND ss.deleted_at is null AND ss.trashed_at is not null
AND (ss.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
order by ss.created_at desc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

select ss.SEQ as seq , ss.subject , DATE_FORMAT(ss.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(ss.updated_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(ss.deleted_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(ss.trashed_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(ss.stt_started_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),"") as sttStartedAt , ss.time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , ss.file_new_nm as fileNewNm , ss.reliability , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION ct WHERE ct.sound_seq = ss.seq AND ct.train_text IS NOT NULL AND ct.train_text != '' ) AS trainTextCount , ss.file_stereo_prefix as fileStereoPrefix , ss.channel_count as channelCount from TB_CS_SOUND ss WHERE SEQ = #{meetSeq}

select ss.SEQ as seq , IFNULL(ti.army_name,"미등록") AS armyName , DATE_FORMAT(ss.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt , DATE_FORMAT(ss.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updatedAt , ss.file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , IFNULL(DATE_FORMAT(ss.stt_started_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'),"") as sttStartedAt , ss.status , IFNULL(ss.error_message,"")as errorMessage , ( SELECT count(s.SEQ) from TB_CS_SOUND s WHERE (s.status < 20 OR s.status = 10 and s.error_message IS NOT NULL)
AND s.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND (s.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
) AS hiddenCount from TB_CS_SOUND ss WHERE ss.seq > 0 and ((ss.status < 20 OR ss.status = 10) and ss.error_message IS NOT NULL)
AND ss.created_at BETWEEN DATE(#{search.searchStartDate}) AND DATE_ADD(#{search.searchEndDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY )
AND (ss.file_org_nm like CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
order by ss.created_at desc
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}

SELECT jo.* FROM ( SELECT so.SEQ , so.file_org_nm , DATE_FORMAT(so.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(so.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(so.deleted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(so.trashed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , so.file_new_nm , so.file_conv_nm , accum.sum FROM TB_CS_SOUND so JOIN ( SELECT tr.sound_seq, SUM(tr.cnt) AS SUM FROM ( SELECT sound_seq, IF ( use_yn = 'Y' OR data_id != '' OR train_text IS NOT NULL ,'1', '0' ) AS cnt FROM TB_CS_TRANSCRIPTION ) tr GROUP BY tr.sound_seq ) accum ON so.SEQ = accum.sound_seq WHERE so.SEQ != -1 AND so.created_at < TIMESTAMP(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{term} DAY ) ) AND so.deleted_at IS NULL ) jo WHERE jo.sum = 0 ORDER BY jo.created_at

select SEQ , subject , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as created_at , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') as updated_at , DATE_FORMAT(deleted_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as deleted_at , DATE_FORMAT(trashed_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as trashed_at , time_duration_ms , file_org_nm , file_new_nm from TB_CS_SOUND WHERE file_org_nm = #{orgnm}

select SEQ as seq , division , subject , created_at as createdAt , updated_at as updatedAt , deleted_at as deletedAt , trashed_at as trashedAt , time_duration_ms as timeDurationMs , file_org_nm as fileOrgNm , file_new_nm as fileNewNm , file_conv_nm as fileConvNm , remark , file_size_bytes as fileSizeBytes , TC_USER_SEQ as tcUserSeq , status , stt_started_at as sttStartedAt , stt_duration as sttDuration , reliability , click_least_once as clickLeastOnce , error_message as errorMessage from TB_CS_SOUND WHERE SEQ > 0 AND created_at BETWEEN str_to_date(#{startDate}, '%Y-%m-%d') AND DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY ) and SEQ >= #{from} and SEQ <= #{to} AND deleted_at is null AND trashed_at is null order by created_at
